models.name: users
models.description: Employee master data table containing user identifiers, names, email addresses, organizational hierarchy (manager, division, department), job roles, employment status, and security settings. Purpose: Core employee reference table used for skill proficiency analysis, training completion tracking, overdue training identification, certification management, and compliance reporting. Essential for joining with user_skill_proficiency to analyze employee skill levels, with transcript for training history, with role_skill_mapping to compare actual vs required skills, and with certification_tracking for certification status. Used in skill gap analysis queries to identify employees with skill deficiencies, in training completion reports to show which users completed compliance training, and in overdue training queries to find employees with past-due training requirements.

properties.description: Unique employee identifier (format: 2-letter + 5-digit, e.g., NC10000, ML10001, TD10002, etc.)
Login username for system access (examples: e.g., rogerevans, vanessarobertson, mariahlopez, etc.)
Employee's full legal name (examples: e.g., Roger Evans, Vanessa Robertson, Mariah Lopez, etc.)
Primary corporate email address (examples: e.g., rogerevans@business.com, vanessarobertson@business.com, mariahlopez@enterprise.com, etc.)
User ID of direct manager (references userId in users table) Examples: e.g., SM33054, DJ15852, GR18086, etc..
Full name of direct manager for display purposes Examples: e.g., Kimberly Smith, Adam Myers, Mary Barnes, etc..
Current job title. Examples: Junior Software Architect, Principal Backend Software Engineer
Job role identifier linking to job_master (format: JB + 5-digit, e.g., JB00877, JB01071, JB01000, etc.)
Business division. Current divisions: Accounting, Bora Division, Test123
Geographic office location. Locations include: Chad, New Caledonia, Mali
Date of most recent system login (format: YYYY-MM-DD) Examples: e.g., 2026-01-13, 2026-02-02, 2026-02-04, etc..
Date when user account was created (format: YYYY-MM-DD) Examples: e.g., 2023-05-16, 2025-05-21, 2023-10-14, etc..
Account status. Possible values: Active (e.g., Active, e.g., Active, e.g., Active, e.g., Active, e.g., Active, e.g., Active)
Employment classification. Types: Employee, Contractor
Functional department. Departments include: Product, Security, Engineering
Business unit or regional entity within organization structure Examples: e.g., Europe, Corporate, Latin America.
Financial cost center code for budget allocation and reporting Examples: e.g., CC-0310, CC-0377, CC-0774, etc..
Date of employment start (format: YYYY-MM-DD) Examples: e.g., 2023-05-12, 2025-04-25, 2023-08-17, etc..
Optional terminationDate field (not currently used in dataset)
Boolean flag for multi-factor authentication status (1=enabled, 0=disabled). 9/10 users have MFA enabled (e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True)
Date of most recent password update (format: YYYY-MM-DD) Examples: e.g., 2025-06-21, 2025-11-14, 2026-01-23, etc..
Count of consecutive failed logins since last success (range: 0-5) Examples: e.g., 0, 2.
Boolean security lock status (1=locked, 0=unlocked). 1/10 accounts locked (e.g., False, e.g., False, e.g., False, e.g., False, e.g., False, e.g., False)
Boolean flag indicating email address verification status (e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True, e.g., True)
System or user ID that created this account Examples: e.g., admin, onboarding_script, system, etc..
System or user ID of most recent account modifier Examples: e.g., system, admin, self.
Date of last account modification (format: YYYY-MM-DD) Examples: e.g., 2024-05-20, 2025-06-04, 2025-08-01, etc..
User's UI language preference. Languages: Japanese, German, Portuguese
User's timezone for date/time displays. Examples: America/New_York, Europe/Berlin

properties.kpis: [{"name": "Total Active Users", "sql": "COUNT(*) WHERE userstatus='Active'"}, {"name": "MFA Adoption Rate", "sql": "SUM(CASE WHEN isMFAEnabled=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)"}, {"name": "Users by Division", "sql": "COUNT(*) GROUP BY Division"}, {"name": "Users by Employee Type", "sql": "COUNT(*) GROUP BY employeeType"}, {"name": "Average Span of Control", "sql": "AVG(direct_reports) FROM (SELECT managerId, COUNT(*) as direct_reports GROUP BY managerId)"}]
properties.queryPatterns: ["Build org chart (recursive self-join on managerId)", "Count users by department/division/location", "Calculate MFA adoption by division", "Find users without recent login (LastLogindate filter)"]
properties.useCases: ["Employee Directory: Maintain master employee data with organizational hierarchy", "Organizational Analysis: Build org charts and analyze reporting structures", "Training Assignment: Identify employees for training enrollment and completion tracking", "Skills Analysis: Join with user_skill_proficiency for employee skill assessments", "Compliance Reporting: Track employee training completion and certification status by division"]
properties.description: Employee master data table containing user identifiers, names, email addresses, organizational hierarchy (manager, division, department), job roles, employment status, and security settings. Purpose: Core employee reference table used for skill proficiency analysis, training completion tracking, overdue training identification, certification management, and compliance reporting. Used in skill gap analysis queries to identify employees with skill deficiencies, in training completion reports to show which users completed compliance training, and in overdue training queries to find employees with past-due training requirements.
